headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Drops As Trump Reinstates Hormuz Blockade; Oil Refiners Rise (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes fell Monday, as President Donald Trump said the U.S. will restart a blockade of Iran in the Strait of Hormuz following fresh strikes between the countries.  Memory-chip maker SK Hynix and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing were among the tech stocks dropping on the stock market today.  The Dow industrials fell 0.3% and the S&P 500 dropped 0.5%, led by the information technology sector.

Memory-chip maker SK Hynix and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing were among the tech stocks dropping on the stock market today.  The Dow industrials fell 0.3% and the S&P 500 dropped 0.5%, led by the information technology sector.

headline: SK Hynix plunges after Nasdaq debut as memory chip euphoria cools
summary: SK Hynix's Seoul shares posted their biggest one-day fall in nearly two decades on Monday, tumbling more than 15%, as investors unwound gains from a scorching rally following the company's Nasdaq debut last week.  The company's U.S.-listed shares dropped 7.9% to $154.7 in early trading after jumping more than ‌12% in their Nasdaq debut on Friday.  Shares of U.S. rivals also dropped.

content.title: SK Hynix plunges after Nasdaq debut as memory chip euphoria cools
content.summary: SK Hynix's Seoul shares posted their biggest one-day fall in nearly two decades on Monday, tumbling more than 15%, as investors unwound gains from a scorching rally following the company's Nasdaq debut last week.  The company's U.S.-listed shares dropped 7.9% to $154.7 in early trading after jumping more than ‌12% in their Nasdaq debut on Friday.  Shares of U.S. rivals also dropped.

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Lower As Oil Spikes On Hormuz Conflict; Memory ETF In Bear Market (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes fell Monday, with oil prices soaring on strikes in the Strait of Hormuz that prompted President Donald Trump to say the U.S. will reinstate a blockade of Iran.  On the stock market today, memory-chip maker SK Hynix plunged, and an exchange traded fund dedicated to memory producers traded in a bear market.

content.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Lower As Oil Spikes On Hormuz Conflict; Memory ETF In Bear Market (Live Coverage)

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow, Nasdaq Close Lower As Oil Prices Spike; This Memory ETF In Bear Market
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes finished in the red Monday, hurt by surging oil prices as President Donald Trump said the U.S. will reinstate a blockade of Iran in the Strait of Hormuz.  Meanwhile, memory-chip maker SK Hynix sank and an exchange traded fund focused on memory producers turned bearish on the stock market today.
